message:
Add issue existence checks to Dolt AddDependency

Validates both issue_id and depends_on_id exist before inserting the
dependency, producing user-friendly "not found" errors instead of raw
MySQL FK violation messages. Skips validation for depends_on_id with
"external:" prefix to support cross-rig references.

Closes dolt-fatbu

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
